subject: An anime boy (Mob / Shigeo Kageyama from Mob Psycho 100) shouting with wide-open mouth and exaggerated expression, suggesting physical or emotional exertion
description: A young male anime figure with short dark hair and rounded face dominates the center of the frame in a close-up. His mouth is wide open in a shout or yell, and his eyes are open wide with visible effort. His expression is exaggerated in the classic anime comedic-exertion style. He wears what appears to be a casual school or club uniform top. Small sparkle or sweat marks are visible around his face, amplifying the comedic energy. The background is a warm blue with decorative sparkle effects typical of the Weiss Schwarz card frame. A 'SAMPLE' watermark crosses the image. The card name and text suggest club activities as the depicted context.
foreground: Anime boy with wide-open mouth yelling, dark hair, school clothes
background: Warm blue with sparkle decorations, card frame elements
emotion: shouting, exertion, comedic strain or effort
